task_completion.description: Access the JFrog Artifactory web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window displaying the JFrog Artifactory login screen or dashboard at http://localhost:8082.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the admin user profile settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory UI shows the 'Edit Profile' or 'User Profile' page specifically for the 'admin' user.

task_completion.description: Change the admin email address to the target email
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Email Address' input field in the profile form contains exactly 'admin@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Reveal or generate the Encrypted Password in the UI
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Encrypted Password' field in the Artifactory UI displays a generated hash/string (not just asterisks or blank).

task_completion.description: Save the encrypted password to the specified local file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the file '/home/ga/encrypted_password.txt' containing the copied encrypted password string.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Artifactory
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the JFrog Artifactory web interface in a browser, rather than exclusively using curl/API commands in the terminal to update the profile.

integrity.description: The saved encrypted password is a genuine hash extracted from the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The text saved in '/home/ga/encrypted_password.txt' is a long encrypted hash that matches the one visible in the Artifactory UI, not a placeholder, a random string, or the plaintext word 'password'.

integrity.description: Agent did not hallucinate the output file contents
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen copying the encrypted password directly from the Artifactory web UI before pasting it into the text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target email to be set in the admin profile is 'admin@example.com'. The encrypted password must be extracted from the Artifactory UI and saved exactly to '/home/ga/encrypted_password.txt'. The default credentials are admin / password.
